englishDefinitions: (intransitive, slang) To become very angry or upset.
(intransitive, slang) To become overly excited, joyous or delighted.
persianTranslation: (ناگذر، عامیانه) بسیار عصبانی یا ناراحت شدن.
(غیر گذرا، عامیانه) بیش از حد هیجان زده، شادی یا مسرور شدن.
examples: When I failed the test, I flipped out.
The audience flipped out when he played his hit songs.
